chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1194 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. No.6558/2023 For orders on M.A. No.6559/2023 For hearing of main case. 31.10.2024 None present. No intimation is given justifying today’s absence. The Petition has challenged the Notification given for purchase of certain Items. Petitioner is not an aggrieved party. This Petition is dismissed along with pending Applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
